body_txt: This is the power that lets the Differently Powered Individual manipulate and fold space. This results in teleportation, bags/pockets/sleeves that are Bigger on the Inside than the outside and / or the ability to ignore bullets . A Reality Warper would have this as part of their powerset. A Super-Trope of Hammerspace , Open and Shut , Bigger on the Inside , Thinking Up Portals , and Perspective Magic . Compare with Mad Mathematician , Gravity Master and Time Master . Not to be confused with Cosmic Power , which deals with the power of the cosmos (though they can definitely overlap). Not to be confused with the Space Master RPG, which is Rolemaster in space .
